easy.title: Polymorphic Area Calculator
easy.description: Write function `total_area(shapes)` calling `s.area()` on each shape and returning sum.
easy.solution:
def total_area(shapes):
    return sum(s.area() for s in shapes)

medium.title: Notification System ABC
medium.starterCode:
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
class Notifier(ABC): pass

hard.title: Plugin Dispatch Processor
hard.description: Build pipeline executing `.transform(data)` on list of polymorphic plugin objects.
